nodes.label: Pipeline Core
nodes.description: Snakemake workflow: alignment → filtering → HLA typing → contigs → translation → proteome filter → MHC affinity → TCRdock → report

nodes.label: Research Program
nodes.description: Manuscript, tool evaluations, experiments, decisions, notebooks, slides

nodes.label: Infrastructure & Ops
nodes.description: GCP orchestration, CI toolchain, release polling, Docker, project management scripts

nodes.label: Documentation
nodes.description: User guides, feature decks, architecture notes, superpower specs

nodes.label: Configuration
nodes.description: Pipeline configs, sample manifests, test configs, GPU overlay

nodes.label: Snakefile
nodes.description: Main workflow entry point — includes all rule modules

nodes.label: build_reference_junctions
nodes.description: Parse GENCODE GTF → reference junction BED

nodes.label: filter_junctions
nodes.description: Classify junctions by origin: annotated→discard, normal_shared, tumor_exclusive

nodes.label: create_alignment_manifest
nodes.description: Create manifest TSV from samples config

nodes.label: hisat2_index
nodes.description: Build HISAT2 genome index (~8 GB RAM)

nodes.label: star_index
nodes.description: Build STAR genome index (~32 GB RAM)

nodes.label: run_optitype
nodes.description: OptiType HLA-A/B/C typing on sample FASTQ

nodes.label: aggregate_hla_alleles
nodes.description: Aggregate OptiType → per-patient alleles with normal-first policy

nodes.label: assemble_contigs
nodes.description: Extract junction-spanning 54 nt contigs via bedtools getfasta

nodes.label: download_human_proteome
nodes.description: Download UniProt Swiss-Prot human proteome FASTA

nodes.label: proteome_filter_peptides
nodes.description: Remove self-peptides via k-mer index against Swiss-Prot

nodes.label: run_mhcflurry
nodes.description: MHCflurry 2.x prediction — per-allele + genotype presentation scores

nodes.label: fetch_vdjdb_panel
nodes.description: Build per-patient VDJdb TCR panel (HLA-matched paired α/β)

nodes.label: download_vdjdb_release
nodes.description: Download pinned VDJdb release + SHA256 verify

nodes.label: download_imgt_germlines
nodes.description: Download IMGT germline reference via stitchrdl

nodes.label: download_fastq
nodes.description: Download FASTQ from GCS or public HTTPS

nodes.label: aggregate_filtering_stats
nodes.description: Concatenate per-step funnel stats into unified filtering_stats.tsv

nodes.label: generate_report
nodes.description: Self-contained HTML report with Mol* 3D viewer

nodes.label: filter_junctions.py
nodes.outputs_schema: novel_junctions.tsv (junction_id, chrom, start, end, strand, mapped_reads, sample_id, sample_type, junction_origin, reading_frame)

nodes.label: build_reference_junctions.py
nodes.description: Parse GENCODE GTF → reference junction BED (chrom, start, end, name, score, strand)

nodes.label: assemble_contigs.py
nodes.description: Extract junction-spanning contigs via bedtools getfasta, exclude soft-clipped

nodes.label: translate_peptides.py
nodes.description: Translate junction contigs → spanning 8/9/10-mers in 3 reading frames, stop-codon filter

nodes.label: proteome_filter.py
nodes.description: Remove self-peptides via k-mer index against UniProt Swiss-Prot

nodes.label: run_mhcflurry.py
nodes.description: MHCflurry 2.x Class1PresentationPredictor — per-allele + genotype presentation scores
nodes.inputs_schema: peptides_novel.tsv or peptides.tsv, alleles.tsv or fallback_alleles
nodes.outputs_schema: mhc_presentation.tsv (contig_key, peptide, best_allele, ic50_nM, processing_score, presentation_score, presentation_percentile, presentation_class, genotype_presentation_score)

nodes.label: aggregate_hla_alleles.py
nodes.description: Aggregate per-sample OptiType → per-patient alleles.tsv with normal-first policy + QC
nodes.outputs_schema: alleles.tsv (locus, allele1, allele2), hla_qc.tsv (source, reads, discrepancy)

nodes.label: run_tcrdock.py
nodes.description: TCRdock AlphaFold-based TCR-pMHC ternary structure prediction (GPU only)
nodes.outputs_schema: top_candidate.pdb, docking_scores.tsv (pLDDT, PAE, pTM, TCR provenance)

nodes.label: fetch_vdjdb_panel.py
nodes.description: Filter VDJdb → per-patient HLA-matched paired α/β TCR panel via stitchr
nodes.outputs_schema: panel.tsv (TCRs with full sequences), panel_qc.tsv (per-allele coverage)

nodes.label: generate_report.py
nodes.description: Self-contained HTML report: junction summary, HLA QC, top binders, Mol* 3D viewer
nodes.inputs_schema: novel_junctions.tsv, filtering_stats.tsv, mhc_presentation.tsv, hla_qc.tsv, vdjdb_panel.tsv, contigs.fa, tcrdock outputs

nodes.label: aggregate_filtering_stats.py
nodes.description: Combine per-step funnel stats into unified filtering_stats.tsv
nodes.outputs_schema: filtering_stats.tsv (patient_id, sample_id, sample_type, step, category, count)

nodes.label: bed12_to_junctions.py
nodes.description: Convert regtools BED12 → 2-column junctions TSV (HISAT2 path)

nodes.label: star_sj_to_junctions.py
nodes.description: Convert STAR SJ.out.tab → 2-column junctions TSV with strand rescue from intron motif

nodes.label: build_gtex_pan_tissue_ref.py
nodes.description: Build GTEx pan-tissue novel-junction blacklist BED from Snaptron gtexv2

nodes.label: run_star_alignment.py
nodes.description: STAR genome index build + alignment on FASTQ samples

nodes.label: python
nodes.description: Conda env: conda-forge + bioconda + pip (pytorch cu126)

nodes.label: hisat2
nodes.notes: samtools intentionally omitted (libdeflate ABI conflict, tracked in #237)

nodes.label: star
nodes.notes: Pinned to 2.7.10b (not 2.7.11+) due to libdeflate ABI conflict (#629)
